# services.mjolnir

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.mjolnir`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.mjolnir.accessTokenFile` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the matrix access token for the `mjolnir` user. |
| `services.mjolnir.dataPath` | `absolute path` | The directory the bot should store various bits of information in. |
| `services.mjolnir.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Mjolnir, a moderation tool for Matrix. |
| `services.mjolnir.homeserverUrl` | `string` | Where the homeserver is located (client-server URL). If `pantalaimon.enable` is `true`, this option will become the homeserver to which `pantalaimon` connects. The listen address of `pantalaimon` will then become the `homeserverUrl` of `mjolnir`. |
| `services.mjolnir.managementRoom` | `string` | The room ID where people can use the bot. The bot has no access controls, so anyone in this room can use the bot - secure your room! This should be a room alias or room ID - not a matrix.to URL. Note: `mjolnir` is fairly verbose - expect a lot of messages from it. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon` | `submodule` | `pantalaimon` options (enables E2E Encryption support). This will create a `pantalaimon` instance with the name "mjolnir". |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable ignoring the accessToken. If true, accessToken is ignored and the username/password below will be used instead. The access token of the bot will be stored in the dataPath . |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.options` | `submodule` | passthrough additional options to the `pantalaimon` service. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.options.dataPath` | `absolute path` | The directory where `pantalaimon` should store its state such as the database file. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.options.extraSettings` | `attribute set` | Extra configuration options. See [pantalaimon(5)](https://github.com/matrix-org/pantalaimon/blob/master/docs/man/pantalaimon.5.md) for available options. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.options.homeserver` | `string` | The URI of the homeserver that the `pantalaimon` proxy should forward requests to, without the matrix API path but including the http(s) schema. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.options.listenAddress` | `string` | The address where the daemon will listen to client connections for this homeserver. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.options.listenPort` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port where the daemon will listen to client connections for this homeserver. Note that the listen address/port combination needs to be lib.unique between different homeservers. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.options.logLevel` | `one of "info", "warning", "error", "debug"` | Set the log level of the daemon. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.options.ssl` | `boolean` | Whether or not SSL verification should be enabled for outgoing connections to the homeserver. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.passwordFile` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the matrix password for the `mjolnir` user. |
| `services.mjolnir.pantalaimon.username` | `string` | The username to login with. |
| `services.mjolnir.protectedRooms` | `list of string` | A list of rooms to protect (matrix.to URLs). |
| `services.mjolnir.settings` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Additional settings (see [mjolnir default config](https://github.com/matrix-org/mjolnir/blob/main/config/default.yaml) for available settings). These settings will override settings made by the module config. |
